title: More Perfect Minecraft
description: This is a survival integration package based on the original game content. The main idea of the integration package is to not change the original survival rhythm, but only make modifications to the player's audio-visual experience. The integration package
body: This is a survival integration package based on the original game content. The main idea of the integration package is to not change the original survival rhythm, but only make modifications to the player's audio-visual experience. The integration package has made significant modifications to performance optimization, feature optimization, feature assistance, visual enhancement, auditory enhancement, and content expansion, aiming to provide players who love the original survival with an immersive experience beyond the original. This integration package is based on the public domain. You can build your own new integration package based on this integration package, and it can be publicly released (you need to indicate on the release page that it has been modified based on a more perfect MC integration package, and paste the author's bilibili video page)
